reviews.review_title: Best horror gtag fan game but needs more
reviews.review_description: I love the game but we need more levels
good game but we need more places to explore

reviews.review_title: best game ever make more games
reviews.review_description: thank you five star

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review, we have another game called The Monke Games if you want to check it out.

reviews.review_title: My kind game but no one can hear me…
reviews.review_description: I like this game a lot! I love it when the bombs explode crazy after my game crashes. It’s so funny. But people don’t seem to hear me. It’s kinda annoying but it’s worth it for the grappling hook.

I love gtag horror games there one of my favorite things to play on vr and this knes really good because I haven't been able to play pcvr in along time cus my pc broke but now I can play one of my favorite pcvr horror games son stand alone quest 😀
it is like Pepee but better I love it 10/10

This game took everything good with the original game and threw that away the ai is buggy and the game crashes a lot and I am a vr game dev so if anyone gets to say this to the dev it’s me 

However the games grappling hook is something that I love I give full credit and respect to the creator of it and I see that the dev worked hard on it but it’s not for me

If you want a scary gorilla tag game that offers more than 4 minutes of enjoyment, play big scary. Big scary is 10x better than this crap. Since the game isn’t getting updates anymore, I don’t recommend downloading. Again, just play big scary and save your time and device space…
THIS GAME DOESN'T HAVE MODERATOR STUFF SO STOP WHINING FOR MOD anyway decent game but I'm sad it's never gonna update again
I have been waiting a year for this to come out on applab I thought they would add it to Kong but they just put on applab I couldn’t sideload it off side quest so it’s now here I’m very happy.
It’s just like kong VR, but better kind of
Update back to old dodoo the new one sucks
Good

reviews.review_description: I'm so happy they made a fangame on Quest I have been waiting for popoo or a fangame of it to release quest and my dream came true
This is the BEST game I ever seen
You should really download it
